title: Hands-Free one-Time and continuous authentication using glass wearable devices
exclusion_reason: The authentication system (Gauth) is based on the possession of a wearable device acting as a hardware token using QR codes and Time-based One-Time Passwords (TOTP). It does not use physiological or behavioral biometric signals for authentication; voice commands are used only as a trigger for the application, not as a biometric identifier.
